title: Votes Update
body:
# 🗳️ Vote Update
Bring back 23w13a_or_b april fools version to newer versions

- 31 votes available!
- No players limit
- Open-source
- Fully customable localization


# 🟪 ItemsAdder
Votes Update is compatible with ItemsAdder.

The only thing you need to do is to extract
[the pack](https://github.com/MathiasDPX/VoteUpdate/releases/latest/download/pack.zip) in `plugins/ItemsAdder/contents`
![How to unzip pack.zip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15dc21b3e1d97e88c40a6bd6bf91a55b7ea19b50.gif)

Votes Update will automaticlly detect the pack and make necessary changes.
